spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates that both spellings resolve to the same logic during the migration window. Toggle between old / new spelling, identical render.

interactive.rationale: Two <select>s — direction value and old/new property — drive a live single-popover stage plus two parallel code panels.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises a synonym-window demonstration; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now surfaces the deprecated inset-area warning text and includes a future-Chrome simulation where the old alias is ignored.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables; --accent-blue popover passes AA on --bg-ivory text.

summary: Verified in chrome-devtools-mcp with Headless Chrome Canary 151 on 2026-06-06: loaded /v131/deprecation-of-css-anchor-positioning-property-inset-area/synonym-window/, changed the direction to bottom right, selected inset-area (deprecated) and observed the visible DevTools warning text, selected the future Chrome removal simulation and observed the fallback warning with no inline anchor-positioning property applied, returned to position-area and confirmed the preferred spelling is applied, confirmed labels for both selects and the ChromeStatus link, and found a clean console with no failed requests.
